title: Minimum Right Rotations to Make Array Increasing

content.problemStatement:
Problem Statement

You are given an array A of size N.

You may perform right-rotation any number of times:

1 right rotation: last element moves to front


Your task:

✔ Determine the minimum number of right rotations needed to make the array strictly increasing.

If it is not possible, return -1.

Example

Input:

5
3 4 5 1 2


Right rotation once:

2 3 4 5 1 → not sorted


Right rotation twice:

1 2 3 4 5 → sorted ✔


Output:

2
content.inputFormat:
Integer  n- array size
N values of Array
